title: rubus cordifrons
intro: Rubus cordifolius, also known as the Heart-leaved Bramble or Heart-leaved Blackberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus cordifolius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as salves and creams.
